meta.title: About Dr. Khaled Ghattass
meta.description: Biography, research, and career of Dr. Khaled Ghattass

hero.description: Cell biologist and expert in human behavior. Author, speaker, and founder of the Al-Warsheh social initiative.

about.entry_1: Cell biologist and expert in human behavior
about.entry_2: Author and speaker — weaving science, art, and philosophy
about.entry_3: Founder of the Al-Warsheh social initiative in Lebanon (2020)
about.entry_4: Trained at Harvard, Cornell, and Stanford — followed by 2M+ across digital platforms
about.bio_paragraph: Dr. Khaled Ghattass is a cell biologist and expert in human behavior who has woven science and art together over a 15-year journey of observing human behavior and influencing communities. As an executive storyteller and poet, Dr. Ghattass works to restore balance to our societies by confronting the misconceptions that negatively shape individuals, families, and communities across the Arab world. Through a distinctive narrative approach, he weaves together science, art, and philosophy to deliver content that fosters critical thinking and calls for positive change. As the founder of the social initiative "Al-Warsheh" in Lebanon, Dr. Ghattass empowers balanced young leaders through art, culture, and science.

newsletter.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address
newsletter.statement: I do not write a newsletter to market. I write it because I want our conversation to continue through the week, even when we do not meet. One essay, a small letter, plenty of meaning.
newsletter.privacy: No ads. I will never share your address. Unsubscribe any time.
newsletter.readers: Read by a million across platforms
newsletter.success_copy: I have your address. Thank you — I'll see you next week.

footer.description: A curated archive of Dr. Khaled Ghattass's thought between science, art, and philosophy — books, lectures, and the Al-Warsheh social initiative.
footer.brand_quote: Words are deeds, and ideas are seeds. What we plant remains.

site_settings.title: Site settings
site_settings.subtitle: Operational toggles for the public site — homepage sections, navigation, footer, hero CTAs, featured content, runtime features, maintenance banner, and coming-soon pages. Changes take effect immediately on save.

groups.homepage_desc: Show or hide each section of the homepage. The hero is always visible — the site needs an opening surface.
groups.navigation_desc: Toggle individual nav links across the header, mobile drawer, and bottom bar. Pages added to Coming Soon are hidden automatically.
groups.footer_desc: Toggle blocks of the global footer.
groups.hero_ctas_desc: Show or hide the buttons under the hero. Hide both for a quieter opener.
groups.featured_desc: Pin a specific item to lead each homepage section. Default uses the first published item.
groups.features_desc: Top-level switches that affect site behavior, not just visual layout.
groups.maintenance_desc: Shown when Maintenance mode is on. Leave fields empty to use the default message.
groups.coming_soon_desc: Selected pages show a Coming Soon screen instead of their content and are excluded from the sitemap. The link still appears in navigation — use the Navigation toggles above if you want to hide it.

homepage.show_hero_desc: The site's opening section. Cannot be hidden.

navigation.bottom_nav_note: The mobile bottom bar mirrors these toggles automatically.

footer.show_footer_brand_desc: Editorial signature line in the footer

featured.default_hint: Empty = use the first published item from the database.

features.auth_enabled_desc: Show Sign In / Sign Up in the public navigation.
features.newsletter_form_enabled_desc: Allow new subscribers to submit the form.
features.maintenance_mode_desc: Show a site-wide banner above all pages.

maintenance.until_hint: Optional. Appended to the banner as "Until <date>".

site_settings.reset_confirm_body: Every toggle and selector will return to its default value. This cannot be undone.

media.upload_coming: Real upload pipeline lands in Phase 6.

products.coming_soon_text: Configure non-book products here once the catalog is ready.

about_teaser.heading: A life in print and memory
about_teaser.bio_preview_fallback: Cell biologist, behavioral expert, author, lecturer, and founder of Al-Warsheh. For over fifteen years he has built a bridge between science and society, delivering more than a thousand lectures across Lebanon and the Arab world.
about_teaser.affiliation: Founder of Al-Warsheh, a social initiative in Lebanon.
